Progress.apiNote: Querying Japan's MLIT Property Library API (usually 5–15s)

Error.retryNote: Please wait and try again. If the issue persists, try different coordinates or another area.
Error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

Empty.prompt: Enter an address or coordinates, then press "Start Research"
Empty.description: We'll analyze the area using official property transaction data from Japan's MLIT.

Report.areaNote: Data covers the entire municipality containing the selected point
Report.hideNote: Unchecked items are hidden in PDF (still visible on screen)

Metadata.homeTitle: Mekiki Research | Property Analysis with Official Gov Data
Metadata.homeDescription: Combining Japan's MLIT official property transaction data with real estate professional insights to reveal the true value and risk of any property.

SearchForm.cardDesc: Click the map, search by address, or use your current location
SearchForm.addressNotFound: Address not found. Try a different keyword.
SearchForm.addressError: An error occurred while searching the address.
SearchForm.geoNotSupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
SearchForm.geoFailed: Could not get your location. Check your browser's location permissions.

PlanModal.modalSubtitle: Open Beta — All features are free to use
PlanModal.ctaGuestTitle: Sign in with Google for free
PlanModal.ctaGuestCpSuffix: Plus access to area analysis reports.
PlanModal.ctaGuestNormalText: {limit} searches per day plus area reports — all free.

PlanModal.ctaProActive: ✅ You're on the Pro plan. All features are unlocked.
PlanModal.waitlistDesc: We'll notify you when the Pro plan launches. Enter your email below.
PlanModal.waitlistDone: Registered! We'll be in touch when we launch.
PlanModal.waitlistError: Please enter a valid email address.
PlanModal.waitlistSaveError: Registration failed. Please try again later.

ReportPage.titleSuffix: Property Prices, Asset Value & Hazard Report
ReportPage.descTemplate: — latest transaction prices, per-㎡ unit prices, flood and landslide risk data.
ReportPage.descPrefix: Based on open data from Japan's MLIT Property Information Library,
ReportPage.noDataMsg: Data for {city} is currently loading. Please check back shortly.
ReportPage.overviewCount: {count} transaction records have been confirmed in {pref}{city}.
ReportPage.hazardTrue: Part of the area falls within a flood inundation zone. We recommend checking the MLIT Hazard Map when selecting a property.
ReportPage.hazardFalse: No flood inundation zone designation has been confirmed in this area, indicating relatively low hazard risk.
ReportPage.lifestyleNote: AI-generated reference image (may differ from the actual area)
ReportPage.ctaTitle: Try a Free Detailed Area Report for {city}
ReportPage.ctaDesc: Generate a 10-section area analysis report powered by MLIT data and expert insights, covering living environment, nearby facilities, and asset value trends.
ReportPage.footerSource: Data source: Japan MLIT Property Information Library
ReportPage.footerCopyright: Data is for reference only. Consult a professional for investment decisions.
